message:
feat(runtime): extend program lifecycle, terminal I/O, and undo system

Major runtime improvements across multiple subsystems:

Program lifecycle (program.rs, +605 lines):
- Graceful shutdown handling with cleanup hooks
- Signal handler integration (SIGINT, SIGTERM, SIGWINCH)
- Panic recovery with terminal state restoration
- Hot reload support for development
- Custom event loop integration points
- Tick-based animation frame scheduling

Terminal writer (terminal_writer.rs, +195 lines):
- Buffered I/O with configurable flush strategies
- Synchronized output support (DCS sequences)
- Write coalescing for reduced syscalls
- Error recovery with automatic retry
- Output statistics collection

Input macros (input_macro.rs):
- Record/playback timing improvements
- Relative vs absolute timing modes
- Macro composition (chain multiple macros)
- Conditional breakpoints

Reactive computed (computed.rs):
- Cycle detection with informative errors
- Lazy evaluation optimizations
- Dependency graph introspection

Undo system (undo/):
- Command grouping for atomic undo
- Named checkpoints for navigation
- Memory-bounded history with eviction
- Redo stack preservation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
